generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position and angular velocity of the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, MotorVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring precise position and angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CNC controller sensor measuring input current (I_M) of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SecondaryVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling, SysML_Tooling
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling, SysML_Tooling
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling, SysML_Tooling
]

instance SecondaryVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling, SysML_Tooling
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling, SysML_Tooling
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tooling
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tooling
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb and Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling
]

instance Simulink_StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling
]

instance Simulink_DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling
]

instance Simulink_LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink_Tooling
]

instance AAS_MABI_MAX100 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS_Enabler
]

instance SysML_Tooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Simulink_Tooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AAS_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell implementation for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables AAS_Service
]

instance MQTT_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SINUMERIK_840D : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance Dashboard_Tooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction models using white-box and black-box approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight, UpdateControlParametersAction
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model comparison of friction simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance AAS_Service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell service for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:provides AAS_Insight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on static, kinetic, and viscous friction models for robot control adjustment"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on motion accuracy improvement through model comparison"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison of simulated and measured data for monitoring"
]

instance AAS_Insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management insights from AAS implementation"
]

instance UpdateControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control parameters based on friction identification insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABI_MAX100_FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow only from physical to virtual, as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT with continuous synchronization between physical measurements and virtual model updates during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical sensors via MQTT with SysML-based structural models, Simulink-based simulation models, AAS for asset management, and dashboard visualization for unified data representation and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), using live data during robot operation for friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference values; combining white-box and black-box friction models to enhance accuracy and account for wear and operational changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards used for modeling and asset description."
]
